sentences.english: Welcome aboard. I'll be your account manager, so if you have any questions I'm your go-to person.
sentences.korean: 합류를 환영합니다. 제가 담당 매니저가 될 거고 질문이 있으시면 저에게 연락하시면 됩니다.

sentences.english: Thank you. We're excited to get started.
Today I'll walk you through the initial setup and the training resources available to your team.
sentences.korean: 오늘은 초기 설정과 팀에서 이용할 수 있는 교육 자료를 안내해드리겠습니다.

sentences.english: How long does the typical onboarding process take?
Most teams are fully operational within two weeks.
We'll also assign a dedicated support engineer who'll be available during your first month.
sentences.korean: 첫 달 동안 이용 가능한 전담 지원 엔지니어도 배정해드립니다.

quiz.question: What does '안심이 되는' mean in English?
